arts.ttl: “When the time is right”: Bayern Munich ace Jamal Musiala disappointed, not focused on Ballon d’Or snub
arts.sum: The Bayern and German superstar knows he just has to keep plugging away — and push his teams toward greater success. For Musiala, bigger team success and individual accolades may just come hand in hand.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery promises to show struggling Manchester United no mercy ahead of Erik ten Hag's make-or-break trip to Aston Villa - as he urges side not to 'relax' after historic Bayern Munich win
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Unai Emery (left) has urged Aston Villa to show no mercy against Manchester United with their beleaguered boss Erik ten Hag (inset) facing an uncertain future.
